info.name: MasterFabric Go Basic — GraphQL API v0.0.1
info.description:
360° Postman collection for the MasterFabric Go Basic GraphQL API.

Covers:
- Health check
- Auth: Register, Login, Refresh Tokens, Logout
- User: Me (profile), Update Profile, Delete Account
- Settings: My Settings, Update My Settings, App Settings
- Edge-case / error-path requests

All token management is automatic via collection scripts.
Import `masterfabric.environment.json` alongside this file.

exec: // Runs before EVERY request in this collection.
// Guarantee the graphql endpoint variable is always set.
// Runs after EVERY request in this collection.
// Assert the server always returns a 200 HTTP status for GraphQL
// (GraphQL errors are surfaced in the JSON body, not via HTTP status).
pm.test('HTTP status is 200 for GraphQL endpoint', function () {
// Warn on unexpected GraphQL-level errors so they are visible in the
// test runner even when a request is not specifically testing an error path.
// No pre-request logic needed for health check.

request.description: Simple liveness probe. Returns `{"status":"ok","version":"..."}`. No auth required.

exec: // No pre-request logic needed for readiness check.

request.description: Readiness probe. Pings Postgres and Redis. Returns 200 with all checks ok, or 503 if any dependency is down.

graphql.query:
query Me {
  me {
    id
    email
    displayName
    avatarURL
    bio
    status
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    phoneNumber
    dateOfBirth
    gender
    location
    websiteURL
    socialTwitter
    socialGitHub
    socialLinkedIn
    language
    address {
      id
      title
      addressLine1
      city
      country
      isDefault
    }
  }
}

request.description: Fetch the authenticated user's full profile. Requires a valid Bearer token.

graphql.query:
mutation UpdateProfile($input: UpdateProfileInput!) {
  updateProfile(input: $input) {
    id
    email
    displayName
    avatarURL
    bio
    status
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    phoneNumber
    dateOfBirth
    gender
    location
    websiteURL
    socialTwitter
    socialGitHub
    socialLinkedIn
    language
    address {
      id
      title
      addressLine1
      city
      country
      isDefault
    }
  }
}
graphql.variables:
{
  "input": {
    "displayName": "{{updatedDisplayName}}",
    "avatarURL": "https://example.com/avatar.png",
    "bio": "Building awesome things with Go and GraphQL.",
    "phoneNumber": "+1-555-0100",
    "dateOfBirth": "1990-06-15",
    "gender": "MALE",
    "location": "Istanbul, Turkey",
    "websiteURL": "https://example.com",
    "socialTwitter": "@mytwitterhandle",
    "socialGitHub": "mygithubhandle",
    "socialLinkedIn": "mylinkedinhandle",
    "language": "en"
  }
}
